name: Ancient Gear Wyvern
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械飛竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアワイバーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ancient Gear" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Ancient Gear Wyvern", also you cannot Set cards for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Wyvern" once per turn. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate monster effects until the end of the Damage Step.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ancient Gear" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Ancient Gear Wyvern", also you cannot Set cards for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Wyvern" once per turn. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate monster effects until the end of the Damage Step.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ancient Gear" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Ancient Gear Wyvern", also you cannot Set cards for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Wyvern" once per turn. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate monster effects until the end of the Damage Step.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
